{{Infobox concept
| name = Alin's eyes
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin's eyes]] have pure white whites and shifting rainbow-colored irises.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin's eyes]] shine with the rainbow of colors from [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]]'s rainbow eyes had orange prominent slices.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
